title: Questions from Quarantine: Schools Reopening with Professor Kayyem and Dr. Mom
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series addresses public inquiries related to navigating the global crisis, offering advice on maintaining mental and physical well-being during quarantine. A specific episode focuses on the complex issue of reopening schools, with the experts providing insights and answering questions from the public. The series encourages audience participation through social media, using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine for submitting questions. This initiative is part of a broader effort to disseminate expert knowledge on security and public health matters during the pandemic.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出每周网络系列节目“隔离期问答”，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在解答公众在疫情期间提出的问题，就如何在全球危机中保持身心健康提供建议。其中一期节目专门探讨了学校重新开放这一复杂议题，专家们分享了见解并回答了公众疑问。节目鼓励观众通过社交媒体参与互动，使用标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine提交问题。该系列是疫情期间传播安全与公共卫生领域专业知识更广泛努力的一部分。
